title: Vincetoxicum wangii
taxonomy: Vincetoxicum wangii is classified in the plant kingdom as a species within the Apocynaceae family. This family consists of over 5,000 species of plants, commonly known as dogbanes or oleander dock. The genus Vincetoxicum, to which Vincetoxicum wangii belongs, is a group of flowering plants native to Asia and Europe. Vincetoxicum wangii is specifically classified within the Vincetoxicum genus, which is further divided into multiple species based on characteristics such as leaf morphology and flower color. The classification of Vincetoxicum wangii is a subject of ongoing study in the field of botany.
